author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Existing test corpus used 3-7 element arrays. Added tests/large_arrays.rs with 6 tests at 10k-100k scale.

Arrow (4): i32 10k, f64 100k bit-exact, bool 50k (mixed patterns for BooleanArray chunking), 2D 100x100 row-major flatten.
Polars (2): i64 10k, f64 100k bit-exact.

Module-level cfg gates so default cargo test skips them. 6 new integration tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 50f768df.
